case_title: SAAKOV, ROMEN et al vs. SAGASTUME, LIDIA MARGARITA et al

docket_entries.description: STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF SEP-25-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON SEP-25-1996, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, OSC TO PLAINTIFF AS TO WHY FAILED TO APPEAR TODAY & FAILED TO FILE A STATUS REPORT ON THE UNINSURED MOTORIST PROSECUTION IN THE FORM OF A DECLARATION. HEARING SET FOR OCT-24-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF OCT-24-1996, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $100.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON OCT-24-1996, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), 2ND ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE NOV-27-1996 CONTINUED FROM OCT-24-1996 TO NOV-27-1996 AT 02:00 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JUL-23-1996, CONTINUED TO SEP-25-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 PURSUANT TO RULE 301(C) RULES OF COURT, UNINSURED MOTORIST CASE IS HEREBY ASSIGNED TO PLAN 2. (PENDING PAYMENT OF $14.00 ORDER FEE) NOTICE SENT BY COURT
